---
pagetitle: "jstats:Home"
title-prefix: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Hero banner sizing (this page only; kept here so it live-reloads, and
     mirrors how the Griffith page scopes its hero CSS). The wordmark and
     tagline are baked into banner.png, so no CSS text overlay is needed. */
  .site-banner {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    margin: 0 0 1.75rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
  }
</style>
```

```{=html}
<img src="images/banner.png" class="site-banner"
     alt="jstats — Statistics in R, Made Accessible">
```

{{< include _developer-bio.qmd >}}

## New here?

The **Get Started** guide takes you from nothing installed to your first real
statistical result — an actual regression — in about an hour, with no prior R
experience needed. You'll do a little setup once, then spend your time getting
results.

[Get Started →](start-here.qmd){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
